FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct TitleBarRegion

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.dll

One reported titlebar region: a rect in CLIENT DIP (the engine's space) + its non-client classification. Pushed on titlebar relayout only (push-on-change — never per frame). First match wins at hit-test, so callers list interactive islands and buttons BEFORE the catch-all Caption band.

public readonly record struct TitleBarRegion : IEquatable<TitleBarRegion>
Implements
IEquatable<TitleBarRegion>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

TitleBarRegion(RectF, TitleBarHit)

One reported titlebar region: a rect in CLIENT DIP (the engine's space) + its non-client classification. Pushed on titlebar relayout only (push-on-change — never per frame). First match wins at hit-test, so callers list interactive islands and buttons BEFORE the catch-all Caption band.

public TitleBarRegion(RectF RectDip, TitleBarHit Hit)

Parameters

RectDip RectF
Hit TitleBarHit

Properties

Hit 

public TitleBarHit Hit { get; init; }

Property Value

TitleBarHit

RectDip 

public RectF RectDip { get; init; }

Property Value

RectF
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
